heading: Purpose
label: 3401 Purpose
text: The purpose of this subchapter is to establish the national ocean exploration program within the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.
notes: Amendments2022— struck out “and the national undersea research program” after “national ocean exploration program”.Pub. L. 117–263

Short Title, , , which provided that part II of subtitle A of title XII of , which enacted subchapter II of this chapter, could be cited as the “NOAA Undersea Research Program Act of 2009”, was repealed by , , .Pub.
